section_miscategorizations.text: I also recommend that the only true preventative mechanism for covid is the vaccine. I do not believe that supplements are necessarily going to help stave this off. I would be concerned if she does n't get the vaccine and I would consider her at high risk based on her quadriplegia status.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The risk stratification statement ('I would consider her at high risk based on her quadriplegia status') is an assessment/synthesis of her condition rather than an actionable step. The surrounding counseling about vaccination is appropriate for the Plan, but the explicit risk characterization belongs more naturally in the Assessment section.
